async fn handle_request(req: Request) -> Response {
    let mode = std::env::var("APP_MODE").unwrap_or_else(|_| "production".into());
    let log_level = std::env::var("LOG_LEVEL").unwrap_or_else(|_| "info".into());
    let feature_flag = std::env::var("FEATURE_X").unwrap_or_default();

    if mode == "debug" {
        return Response::debug();
    }

    let result = process(&req, &log_level, &feature_flag).await;
    Response::ok(result)
}

fn get_api_base() -> String {
    std::env::var("API_BASE_URL").unwrap_or_else(|_| "https://api.example.com".into())
}

async fn process(_req: &Request, _log_level: &str, _feature: &str) -> String { todo!() }

struct Request;
struct Response;
impl Response {
    fn debug() -> Self { Self }
    fn ok(_body: String) -> Self { Self }
}
